IPI Indoor · Documentation

User Manual

Complete usage guide for the MOSCURE IPI 1 — your compact, USB-powered indoor mosquito trap. Model: MC-IPI 1.

Product Overview

Technical specifications for the MC-IPI 1 portable indoor mosquito trap.

ModelMC-IPI 1
Power Input5V DC via USB
Power Consumption1.5W
Dimensions119mm × 178mm
Weight280g
ConnectivityMicro USB (Type B)

Key Features

Built for quiet, chemical-free indoor protection — compact enough to go anywhere.

Energy-Efficient UV LED

365nm wavelength UV light precisely tuned to mosquito phototaxis — powerful attraction at only 1.5W.

Ultra-Portable Design

Weighing just 280g with a compact foldable build — slips into a bag for travel, camping, or desk use.

Universal USB Power

Runs on any 5V USB source — laptop port, power bank, or mobile charger. No wall socket required.

Chemical-Free & Odor-Free

No pesticides, sprays, or harmful gases. Completely safe for children, pets, and sensitive individuals.

Zero Consumables

No replacement bulbs, no refills needed. Plug in and let it operate — no recurring costs.

Removable Collection Net

Slide-out net design for quick, hygienic disposal of trapped insects — cleaned in under a minute.

Silent Dehydration Mechanism

Captured mosquitoes die through natural dehydration in the sealed net — no noise, no chemicals.

Optimised UV Wavelength

Precisely calibrated output activates the mosquito phototaxis instinct for maximum lure effectiveness.

How It Works

Three-step science behind silent, effective indoor mosquito capture.

01

The 365nm UV LED emits light at a wavelength specifically calibrated to activate mosquito phototaxis (light-seeking behaviour), drawing them towards the device from the surrounding area.

02

A silent internal fan generates a continuous, steady airflow that pulls approaching mosquitoes through the inlet and into the removable collection net — without noise or disturbance.

03

Trapped inside the sealed net and cut off from air and moisture, mosquitoes die through natural dehydration — safely and without any chemicals, sprays, or noise.

Maintenance

Keep your IPI 1 performing at its best with minimal effort.

  • Clean the collection net at least once per week to maintain peak trapping effectiveness.
  • Always unplug the USB cable from the power source before performing any cleaning.
  • Remove the collection net from the device and empty trapped insects into a bin.
  • Wash the net and container with warm, mildly soapy water to remove any residue.
  • Allow all parts to dry completely before reassembling and reconnecting the device.

IPI Indoor

India's most effective MLID and Phototaxis technology mosquito trap. Chemical-free, family-safe protection against Dengue, Malaria, and Chikungunya.
